title: astragalus echinus subsp. chionistrae
intro: Astragalus echinus subsp. chionistrae, also known as the Chionistra sub-species of the spiny milk-vetch, is a type of plant belonging to the legume family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astragalus echinus subsp. chionistrae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
